name: Do I get paid if I can't work after my injury in Saint George?
description: Yes, ~66% of weekly wage for temporary total disability if approved.[2]

mainEntity.name: Do I get paid if I can't work after my injury in Saint George?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, ~66% of weekly wage for temporary total disability if approved.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, Utah and Idaho provide temporary total disability benefits at about 66 2/3% of your average weekly wage once approved.[2] Payments start after insurer accepts claim via Form 141.[2] Key factors: Multiple jobs? Provide history for full wage calc; covers lost income, medical, permanent impairment.[1][2] Practical guidance: Track all missed work, submit to insurer; if denied, dispute immediately. Benefits continue until max medical improvement.
